title: Stock market today: Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq wobble as Trump tamps down China threats amid regional bank jitters
Stock market today: Dow drops 300 points, S&P 500, Nasdaq slide as regional bank woes hit markets
Gold prices jump on safe-haven demand and Fed rate-cut hopes
Trending tickers: Praxis, Western Alliance, Rigetti, Micron and Smiths
Wall Street muted and FTSE falls amid regional bank jitters and Trump easing China tensions
